full_text:
Zhao Ci
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Ci. Rebelled against and killed Qin Xie. Killed by Wang Min. Zhao Ci was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhao Ci lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
